title: Authenticated users can steer regular web-push reminder delivery to arbitrary stored endpoints

affected_locations.label: source
affected_locations.detail: web_push_subscriptions stores user_id, endpoint, p256dh, auth, and timezone.

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: Authenticated owner_all write policy lacks endpoint validation/provenance control.

affected_locations.label: entrypoint/wrapper
affected_locations.detail: Service-role scheduled function reads all stored subscription endpoints.

notes: Kept separate from cand-002 because the regular reminder sender is an independently reachable scheduled operation with its own trigger conditions and sink line.

title: Authenticated users can steer proactive coach push delivery to arbitrary stored endpoints

affected_locations.label: source
affected_locations.detail: web_push_subscriptions stores endpoint and key material.

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: Current owner_all policy still allows user-managed endpoint rows without endpoint validation/provenance control.

affected_locations.label: entrypoint/wrapper
affected_locations.detail: Service-role scheduled function reads all stored subscription endpoints when enabled.

notes: Kept separate from cand-001 because coach-push is an independent scheduled sender and feature-gated product path.
